key_insight: The paper turns high-dimensional PDE solving into a neural inf-sup saddle-point optimization problem using a primal network and a Lagrange-multiplier network.
engineering_relevance: This provides a scalable PDE solver framework that is designed to better handle high-dimensional problems while offering theory-driven error control.
method: Reformulate the PDE as an inf-sup optimization problem with a Lagrange multiplier.
Parameterize the primal solution and multiplier with two neural networks.
Train them with iterative saddle-point optimization and derive error bounds for approximation, sampling, and optimization errors.
evidence_signal: The abstract reports numerical experiments showing accuracy, stability, and efficiency, alongside theoretical equivalence and rigorous error estimates.
watch_item: Performance may depend on the stability of saddle-point training and on balancing network approximation, sampling, and optimization errors in practice.
paper_title: Inf-Sup Neural Networks for High Dimensional PDEs
